top_signals.title: Nine countries pull out of Ukraine ammunition coalition
top_signals.summary: Czech-led initiative aimed at supplying Kyiv with millions of shells has halved since December, says president
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine Cuts Gas Storage Rates To Encourage Domestic Buildup Ahead Of Winter
top_signals.summary: Ukraine's state energy regulator has cut storage fees for natural gas by 11% in a bid to accelerate domestic gas injection, with an option to further lower the rate if capacities are booked long-term for at least one year.  The discount creates favorable tariff structures to leverage Ukraine's massive storage capabilities. Ukraine has set a target to store at least 14.6 billion cubic meters (bcm) of gas, good for 34% of total capacity, before the 2026–2027 heating season. Ukraine is home to Europe's largest underground gas storage capacity,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CDC asks staff to volunteer for airport Ebola screenings
top_signals.summary: The public health agency, which underwent mass firings last year, wants to expand its screening capabilities amid a deadly outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
